rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/15/23. As indicated in the Examiner's Notes sent on 10/24/22, the order for distribution must incorporate the terms of the testamentary trust so as to give effect to the conditions existing at the time distribution is ordered. The pertinent provisions must be stated in the present tense and in the third person instead of quoting the will verbatim [CRC 7.650(b)]. Please e-lodge (via e-filing) a revised order by 1/30/23.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SANDRA MARGARITA ESPINOZA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Determination Of Right To Entitlement Of Distribution Of Heirs
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/30/2023. The statement of interest must be signed by Annabelle Espinoza as a person joining in the pleading. CRC 7.103(a). See also CRC 7.3(2). Counsel's verification alleges that Annabelle Espinoza live outside of San Francisco County where the counsel's office is located, but her address on file is in San Francisco. If she is unable to sign for some other cause (see CRC 7.103(c)), supporting facts must be provided.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN ARTHUR PALLADINO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Item 4 of the I&A should NOT be completed when a Probate Referee HAS BEEN appointed. Prob. C. Sect. 9202(b) also requires notice if an heir or beneficiary HAS PREVIOUSLY BEEN confined in a prison or facility under the jurisdiction of the Department of Corrections, etc. Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).] When papers are not filed electronically, each paper presented for filing must contain two prepunched normal-sized holes, centered 21/2 inches apart and 5/8 inch from the top of the paper. [CRC 2.115.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN ARTHUR PALLADINO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Discharging Practice Administrator And Approving Account Of Practice Administrator
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing with judicial officer's approval. [CRC 2.110(a).] When papers are not filed electronically, each paper presented for filing must contain two prepunched normal-sized holes, centered 21/2 inches apart and 5/8 inch from the top of the paper. rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF CLARENCE JOSEPH SUGHROUE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/13/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: As of January 2008, the Judicial Council form Summary of Account must be used for all conservatorship accounts. [Prob. C. Sect. 2620(a) and CRC 7.575.] No time sheets were submitted for either the conservator or the attorney. The final court accounting of the guardian or conservator following the death of the conservatee shall include a court accounting for the period that ended on the date of death and a separate accounting for the period subsequent to the date of death. [Prob. C. Sect. 2620(b).] There were disbursements for auto insurance but no automobile inventoried? The detailed schedules supporting the summary of account must show the nature or purpose of each receipt or disbursement, the source of the receipt or name of the payee, and the date thereof. [Prob. C. Sect. 1062.] Under what authority did the conservator reimburse himself and Oscar Rivas for "miscellaneous household expense" in even amounts nearly every other day? Receipts may need to be filed. Please file the Citibank credit card statements to support $10,536.57 in charges paid out of the conservatorship estate. The original bank statement for account xxx3311 immediately preceding the date of appointment does not appear to have been filed. The original statement for account xxx6400 encompassing the ending date of the accounting period (9/22/22) does not appear to have been filed. The bank accounts appear never to have been transferred to conservatorship accounts; they were still in the name of the conservatee. (Only the beginning balance and ending balance need to be verified. The statements attached to the petition and filed confidentially were not in order or were in reverse chronological order for one account but chronological order for the other.) The filing fee for this petition was $435, not $450. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 3/2/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. No petition for final distribution or report of status of administration with a request for additional time has been filed yet, as ordered on 1/19/22. No Final I&A has been filed yet as required to be done within four months after Letters are first issued to a general personal representative. [Prob. C. Sect. 8800(b).] Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: Meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING MUST CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME. PLEASE HAVE YOUR CASE NUMBER AND NAME READY FOR THE CLERK.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROSE OSTBY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/13/23. No earlier available date. STILL NO courtesy copy of the declaration filed on 11/7/22 has been received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C.] The proposed personal representative STILL HAS NOT VERIFIED the declaration filed by his attorney on 1/25/22. [CRC 7.103(c).] STILL NO proof of service of 15 days' notice to the French consulate has been filed. The proof of service filed on 11/18/21 showed that notice of the foregoing [sic] Notice of Petition to Administer Estate was mailed on 11/18/21 but the copy of the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate attached to the proof of service showed the 11/22/21 hearing date. Courtesy copies the declaration filed on 11/7/22 and any other papers filed to address these issues (the petitioner's verification of his attorney's declaration, proof of service of 15 days' notice to the French consulate), must be received by the assigned examiner no later than 3/2/23. If responsive papers are not filed in time to deliver courtesy copies to the examiner by 3/2/23, an appearance may be required on 3/13/23 for the Court to determine if the petition should be taken off calendar. [Formal Examiner's Notes are rarely issued any more and in any event are not filed for the record; responsive pleadings (amendments or supplements, as set forth in CRC 7.3) should stand on their own and not refer to Examiner's Notes.] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
